title: Technical Project Manager for MINDEF (7 years experience)
description:
[1 year contract, renewable]

Background
You will be collaborating across the executive teams from GovTech and MINDEF (Digital and Corporate Transformation Division). We are seeking a highly skilled and systematic Technical Project Manager to lead and deliver large-scale digital transformation initiatives. The successful candidate will bring strong expertise in cloud computing (preferably AWS), software engineering, and enterprise-scale digital product delivery, with a proven track record in managing multiple stakeholders and achieving outcomes within scope, budget, and timeline.

Your work will have a large impact on all national servicemen and our military in terms of meeting their IT-supported service’s needs.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead end-to-end delivery of enterprise digital solutions, ensuring alignment with business objectives, user needs, and regulatory requirements.
  • Drive structured planning, execution, and reporting across project lifecycle stages—initiation, requirements, design, build, testing, deployment, and sustainment.
  • Implement and oversee risk management frameworks and cybersecurity best practices throughout software development lifecycle and project delivery.
  • Ensure projects adhere to budgetary controls, timeline commitments, and quality standards.
  • Foster collaboration between internal teams, external vendors, and public sector stakeholders to achieve successful outcomes.
  • Be able to independently create strategies to communicate, manage risks and dependencies to senior leadership.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering, or related discipline.
  • At least 8 years’ experience in the tech or related industry and 5 years in the project management field.
  • Candidates with strong knowledge and hands-on experience in cloud computing (AWS) and modern software engineering practices, will be considered favourably.
  • Proven track record of delivering large-scale enterprise digital solutions in complex environments.
  • Strong experience managing transformation projects and coordinating multiple stakeholders across business and technical domains.
  • Expertise in risk management frameworks, cybersecurity standards, and compliance requirements.
  • Strong analytical, systematic, and organizational skills, with the ability to drive projects to successful completion.
  • Certifications in one or more of the following areas will be preferred (not mandatory):
    >Software Engineering (e.g., SEI, IEEE, or equivalent)
    >Cybersecurity (e.g., CISSP, CISM, CISA)
    >Project Management (e.g., PMP, PRINCE2, Agile/Scrum)
  • Public service experience (government or regulated industries) is a significant advantage.

Key Attributes

  • Disciplined and detail-oriented, with a structured approach to problem-solving.
  • Strong communicator able to bridge technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  • Resilient under pressure, with the ability to manage complexity and ambiguity.
  • Strategic thinker who can balance near-term execution with long-term value creation.

postedCompany.description:
We are an award-winning, full-service Web Solutions Company based in Singapore. Websparks Pte Ltd is formed in 2008.


Each of our Websparkers should be Curious, Collaborative, Committed, and a Challenger. We wake up daily to deliver extraordinary digital experiences to our customers.


Websparks is an ISO 27001 certified company. ISO/IEC 27001 is the leading international standard for information security management and helps organizations to keep information assets secure. Websparks is an ISO 9001:2015 certified company. We have demonstrated to external auditors our commitment to quality. We are able to consistently provide products and services that meet our client’s requirements.


Websparks is named as APN Select Consulting Partner as a result of our investment in technical resource development aimed at ensuring efficient usage of the AWS cloud. Websparks is certified as a Microsoft Gold Application Development, Silver Application Integration and DevOps Partner. We are equipped with the tools and resources to deliver the best quality of software.


Websparks is a Progress Gold Partner. As a Progress partner, we play a key role in helping organizations of all sizes – across all industries – transform and run their businesses. Websparks is a Sitecore Solution Partner.  Solution partners bring their customers' unique visions to dynamic life on their websites with the Sitecore Experience Platform.
postedCompany.name: WEBSPARKS PTE. LTD.
